versionNotes: v4 (current, 2026-04-24 late) - post-review hardening:
- lottery: obligated_amount field tracks unclaimed winner liability
so sweep_unclaimed_to_bankroll cannot accidentally take rollover
funds destined for the next round (H2 fix)
- lottery: SWEEP_GRACE_MS=1h between claim deadline and earliest sweep
closes the same-block claim/sweep race (H4 fix)
- lottery: RoundSettled event now emits base_rollover + obligated_amount
for proper accounting reconciliation (C1 fix)
- bankroll_pool: pause check removed from pay_winner / refund_bet
so legitimate winner payouts cannot be frozen during ops emergency
(H3 fix). Pause still gates collect_bet (new exposure).
- bankroll_pool was UPGRADED in-place via UpgradeCap (function body
changes only), so BankrollPool object + 100K NUSDC seed remain.
- lottery was FRESH-PUBLISHED (struct field added), so v3 lottery is
deprecated; new GameCap issued from same bankroll for v4 registry.
v3 (deprecated, 2026-04-24 late) - 5-of-32 -> 5-of-25 recalibration:
- Lottery range C(32,5)=201,376 -> C(25,5)=53,130, ~3.8x jackpot freq
- Tier payout BPS unchanged (60/25/15 within 70% prize pool)
v2 (deprecated, 2026-04-24 18:xx UTC) - post-audit hardening:
- treasury_deposit GameCap-gated (closes LP inflation)
- LPToken soulbound, owner field removed
- emit_game_result uses cap.game_id (no spoof)
- session_id: vector<u8> (widened from ID)
- provide_liquidity MIN_LP_DEPOSIT=10 NUSDC + virtual-offset share math
- refund_bet, admin-mutation events added
- close/draw time sanity checks in create_round
- LotteryRegistry.game_cap installed at launch
v1 (deprecated, 2026-04-24 AM) - contained LP inflation vector; do not use.

bankrollPool.upgradeNotes: v2 -> upgraded 2026-04-24. pay_winner / refund_bet pause check removed (H3). BankrollPool object + 100K NUSDC seed unchanged. Original packageId still required for type identity and event subscriptions.

mines.devnetOnly: mine_positions field is visible via getObject RPC. Encrypted placement (ECIES + house key) required before mainnet.

crash.operatorAlias: crash-operator (suiprivkey stored in admin laptop keystore + chat-server .env.production for keeper child env)
crash.status: v5 upgraded with halved-ramp formula (slow curve). Frontend devnet-ids.json + chat-server CRASH_PKG synced 2026-04-29.
v2UpgradeNotes: v5 upgrade (2026-04-28): UpgradeCap-based upgrade. Struct unchanged. Halved multiplier ramp coefficients (MULT_LINEAR 6→3, MULT_QUAD_NUM 36→9, MULT_QUAD_DEN 10000→20000) and doubled INVERSE_SEARCH_HI 120000→240000 to give players ~2x longer FLYING windows. New packageId 0xaa50442c...; previous v3 retained via linker. Frontend/chat-server formula updated in commit 8eabf275; devnet-ids/CRASH_PKG sync was missed and caused systematic cashout invalidation until 2026-04-29.

v3 upgrade (2026-04-26): UpgradeCap-based upgrade. Struct unchanged. Added: operator_finalize_empty_stuck_round (with state/time guard) + OperatorEmptyFinalize event. Lets keeper auto-recover from empty stuck rounds without AdminCap. New packageId 0xab03c5f2...; previous 0x546f9f13... (v2) retained via upgrade.

v2 upgrade (2026-04-25): UpgradeCap-based upgrade. Struct unchanged. Added: INVERSE_SEARCH_TOP_BPS assert in resolve_round, admin_finalize_stuck_round, update_max_payout_via_bp_admin, unique session_id (round_id || player). Removed: paused field idea (off-chain via CRASH_ENABLED env + PM2 stop sufficient).
v1 (2026-04-25 earlier): packageId same as originalPackageId. operator was deployer wallet. max_single_payout 10k. stale round 0x896421... at v1. Now superseded but registry/cap retained via upgrade.

v3.note: Superseded by v4 (post-review hardening). v3 had H2 (sweep can take rollover), H4 (claim/sweep race), C1 (event accounting). Round 1 was created on v3 but is replaced by v4 Round 1 once keeper restarts.

v2.note: 5-of-32 lottery; superseded by v3 (recalibration to 5-of-25). v2 GameCap remains in v2 registry but unused.

v1.note: DO NOT USE. v1 contains critical LP inflation attack. 100K NUSDC is stranded in v1 BankrollPool (no admin withdraw path); devnet-only cost.
